headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Las Vegas Sands, Lowers Price Target to $53
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Trey Bowers   maintains Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $65 to $53.
